name: Review Animations
description: Review animation and motion code against a high craft bar — timing, easing, origin, and consistency. Default to flagging; approval is earned.

install.cursor: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill review-animations -a cursor -g -y
install.claude: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill review-animations -a claude-code -g -y
install.codex: npx skills add emilkowalski/skills --skill review-animations -a codex -g -y
